channel.title: IAMTrail - Endpoint Changes
channel.description: Track changes to AWS service endpoints from botocore. An unofficial archive by zoph.io.

item.title: Endpoint changes: 4 new service(s), 1 service expansion(s)
item.description:
4 new service(s), 1 service expansion(s)

  • globalaccelerator expanded to ap-southeast-6
  • acm (2 endpoints)
  • oidc (1 endpoint)
  • portal.sso (1 endpoint)
  • sso (1 endpoint)

View on IAMTrail

item.title: Endpoint changes: 2 service expansion(s)
item.description:
2 service expansion(s)

  • api.mediatailor expanded to eu-west-2
  • route53resolver expanded to us-isob-west-1

View on IAMTrail
